Container.Name: openhabittracker
Container.Overview: Take notes, plan tasks and track habits - free, ad-free, open source, no account, all data on your server. This container is the self-hosted sync server: native apps for Windows, Linux, Android, iOS and macOS log into it and sync. Single user; log in at /login with the credentials you set below. Includes a REST API with OpenAPI UI at /scalar/v1. Habits show how overdue you are instead of guilt-driven streaks.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: habit tracker todo task notes markdown journal selfhosted sync
Container.Requires: A password and a JWT secret must be set before the first start.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web interface.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: SQLite data: notes, tasks, habits, settings.

Config.Name: Username
Config.Description: Login username for the single user.

Config.Name: Email
Config.Description: Login email for the single user.

Config.Name: Password
Config.Description: Login password for the single user.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Secret used to sign login tokens. Generate one in the Unraid terminal with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: tz database name, e.g. Europe/Berlin - sets the day boundary for habit tracking.
